authority: agent-skills-curated demand and capability disposition only; not a cognition claim, monitoring standard, candidate execution authorization, or production runtime claim

demandRecord.title: Cognitive offloading, monitoring, failure learning, and anti-accretion
demandRecord.demand: Reduce mechanical cognitive burden without assuming durable learning or skill growth, and route serious or repeated failures into proportionate monitoring, root-cause, regression, feedback, versioning, and retirement loops without making every anecdote permanent structure.
sourceEvidence: STM-09 requires short-term performance, self-report, learning, and longitudinal capability claims to remain separate.
P20 covers both missing durable improvement after serious or repeated failure and evidence-free permanent control or Skill accretion.
SG-10 assigns monitoring and learning across operations and maintainers, with no single upstream Skill owner and incomplete thresholds, destinations, effectiveness, and retirement criteria.
uncertainty: Long-term cognition and skill erosion evidence remains limited and cannot be inferred from immediate task performance.
Repository routing scenarios and local verification do not prove production monitoring health or organizational learning effectiveness.
No universal recurrence threshold, trace schema, durable destination, or retirement rule is accepted.
heldClaims: Monitoring, memory, handoff, observability, incident learning, regression, and retirement are distinct surfaces and need not all be activated for every task.
No anecdote, coordinate, or tool count automatically justifies a new Skill, Hook, metric, permanent control, or hard standard.
recheckTriggers: a serious or repeated failure produces no traceable correction, regression evidence, or retirement decision
measured cognitive load, review quality, unaided capability, or learning outcomes degrade under the current assistance pattern
a bound production or educational use case exposes a monitoring or learning capability missing from current native, runtime, curated, recipe, and governance paths

alternatives.path: native reasoning and concise summaries reduce mechanical load while preserving user-visible assumptions, choices, and verification
skill.curated.handoff plus repository-owned continuation evidence for bounded state transfer
alternatives.evidence: approved admission and deterministic handoff scenarios

alternatives.path: skill.curated.observability-and-instrumentation for a bound production visibility problem
alternatives.evidence: approved admission and six observability decision scenarios

alternatives.path: host or service telemetry, eval, incident, audit, and health surfaces
alternatives.evidence: runtime-resolved observability scenario and source owner mapping

alternatives.path: test, release, migration, rollback, recovery, and knowledge-capture recipes route repeatable failures into evidence and action
alternatives.evidence: checked-in recipe gates and lifecycle policy

alternatives.path: maintainers classify recurrence, destination, effectiveness, supersession, deprecation, and removal
the responsible human, educator, organization, or domain owner decides what thinking to retain, practise, review, or assess without AI
alternatives.evidence: P17 owner mapping and longitudinal evidence boundary

alternatives.path: do not add telemetry, Hook, Skill, checklist, or durable record when risk, recurrence, value, privacy, and maintenance evidence do not justify it
alternatives.evidence: P24 friction and P20 anti-accretion constraints

decision.nextGate: reconcile the complete selected coordinate envelope and retain longitudinal, production, and demand-model limits before any stage-close or standard decision
